finalAssistantMessages.text: I’m adding the result file now. The entries focus on the visible dolls, outfits, stone setting, and the lace-up platform shoes with monster-mouth details, without claiming sale status or exact location.
The wave-11 result file is written. I’m running the limited self-check now: parse only this JSON, confirm five items, and verify every required field plus the correct `describedBy`.
